title: tectaria pilosa
intro: Tectaria pilosa, also known as the Hair Fern, is a species of fern native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tectaria pilosa include treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as being used to reduce fever and alleviate menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Tectaria pilosa can be made by infusing the dried fronds in hot water or using them as a tea to reap its medicinal benefits.
